steps.title: Treat a over b as one quantity
steps.content: The first equation gives $\frac{5a}{b}=8.25$, so divide by $5$: $$\frac{a}{b}=\frac{8.25}{5}=1.65$$

steps.title: Substitute into the second equation
steps.content: Rewrite the second equation as $$\frac{a}{bn}=\frac{a}{b}\cdot\frac{1}{n}=33$$ Substitute $\frac{a}{b}=1.65$: $$\frac{1.65}{n}=33$$

steps.title: Solve for n
steps.content: $$1.65=33n$$ $$n=\frac{1.65}{33}=0.05$$ This also means $\frac{1}{n}=20$, which makes $1.65\cdot 20=33$. The grid-in answer can be .05, 0.05, or 1/20.
